data.body: Session close note (2026-04-27 worktree-20260427-180419): Outbound sync verified locally (CREATE, COMMENT, STATUS all pushed to Jira via ACLI). Inbound sync previously verified in CI. Two blockers remain open: (1) Checkpoint rewind for the test ticket (5dc3-0d5e) is blocked by tickets-tracker-guard — the guard prevents direct CLI calls to inbound bridge; needs investigation into a safe path for inbound-only runs. (2) COMPACT event on tickets branch causes bridge to re-CREATE a duplicate Jira issue and lose prior key mapping (tracked separately as da40-8e3e). Recommend: transition to open and address the COMPACT duplication bug as the next step before re-attempting checkpoint rewind.
